paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05 as of July 17, representing a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a window of 20 sessions. There have been 2 new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines are focused on the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes. The news articles from simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance discuss the potential impact of these events on the company.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there has been 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings.
